## Pre-merge checklist
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the change
- [ ] Tests cover the change or it is a safe refactor
- [ ] CI logs reviewed if failures occurred
- [ ] Documentation updated if applicable
- [ ] Commits are signed (Verified)

## Definition of Done checklist
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are fully covered or documented as partial/blocked
- [ ] Tests and validation evidence are included
- [ ] Documentation is updated where applicable
- [ ] Risks and mitigations are documented
- [ ] Related TC/IMPL/Confluence links are included
